name: Cookies'n Cream Angel Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to package instructions.
2. Gently fold in the finely crushed Oreos.
3. Pour the batter into a prepared pan and bake as directed on the package.
4. Allow the cake to cool completely once baked.
5. Remove the cake from the pan, if necessary.
6. Frost the cake with your choice of frosting, if desired.
